titles.title: What a Faithful God Have I

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I come before Your throne of grace I find rest in Your presence And fullness of joy In worship and wonder I behold Your face Singing what a faithful God have I

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What a faithful God have I What a faithful God What a faithful God have I Faithful in every way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord of mercy You have heard my cry Through the storm your the beacon My song in the night In the shelter of your wings Hear my hearts reply Singing what a faithful God have I
